headline: Huron Yards phase two nearing completion
paragraphs: Crane Development's Huron Yards is on track to wrap phase two in 2026. The former Alleyway building at 28 N. Erie St. is being renovated into a new restaurant called The Station , and a grocery store is taking the ground floor of the old Okun Produce building. Resident parking and the upcoming beer garden's site work are finished.
why_it_matters: A grocery store in the Warehouse District is the missing-amenity piece that turns downtown-adjacent districts from "lively at night" into "lively all day." Strengthens the case for the next residential phase.
search_terms: Huron Yards Crane Development Warehouse District The Station Okun grocery
